{{Quote|I have made it appear that one of the most prominent of the delegates from Lahsbane had compromised Princess Kamida, a lovely young Ewok, whose true swain, Tippet... is a pillar of both his own race and the Alliance, and I arranged for an impartial, utterly trustworthy blabbermouth to see the most incriminating moment of the whole!|Hirog|<ref name="marvel94" />}}
'''Kamida''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Prince/Legends|princess]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Kamida was courted by [[Tippet/Legends|Tippet]], a respected Ewok warrior, in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], when [[Hiromi]] saboteur [[Hirog]]—looking to incite conflict between the Ewoks and the [[Lahsbee/Huhk|Lahsbees]]—framed Kamida for having an affair with a Lahsbee delegate to the [[Alliance of Free Planets]]. The scandal resulted in an outbreak of violence between Ewoks and Lahsbees on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], but Hirog's treachery was soon exposed and the conflict quashed.<ref name="marvel94" />
